### Post by saif_held on 2010-06-19
Sir I'm guessing that your problem lies in the fact that you've 5 partitions but not sure, my other guess would be that there's a corrupted partition that's causing the trouble. Try to check the following link it might help:

[http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=1477371](http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=1477371)

Please tell me whether you solved the problem or not.

### Post by saif_held on 2010-06-23
> **maizuddin35 said:**
> assalamualaikum. can I know what is the problem?

Wa Alaikom Al Salam Brother, the problem was that when our friend was trying to install Ubuntu, for some reason it couldn't see his HDD partitioned, instead one as a one bulk partition.

I suggested that one of the partitions could be corrupted and it seems one really was. He installed Ubuntu successfully though :)
